## Source: ossf-package-analysis (2565ee1140267bcec7b5665365d0e0ed3dcebad8035fdbf833423af04aeb7f86)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-proxima-enterprisemanagement' @ 1.2.3 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
